offense_profile.label: Run-Game Builder
offense_profile.strategic_intent: Build first-down run credibility, then convert defensive fit reactions into conservative play-action answers.
expected_behavior: conservative offense risk on every call

defense_profile.label: Pressure-Look Defender
defense_profile.strategic_intent: Mix simulated and true pressure on long downs while accepting higher-risk calls.
expected_behavior: zero_pressure plus simulated_pressure >= 15 calls across seed pack
aggressive defense risk >= 15 calls across seed pack
defense rush burn >= 45 across seed pack

film_room.headline: Stopped - out of plays
notes: No high-leverage graph event dominated the drive; compare call sequencing and risk level across seeds.
suggested_tweaks: Review call sequencing, resource use, and risk level against nearby fixed seeds.
film_room.next_adjustment: Next try: review call sequencing across nearby seeds.
